context: Brief description of why you're evaluating this server and what matters most.

tests.name: simple-tool-call
tests.workflow_step: Verify the tool responds and returns structured data
assertions: Each result has an ID field
Response contains structured data, not raw HTML or error text

tests.name: filtered-query
tests.workflow_step: Test search with specific params and pagination
assertions: Results are relevant to the query
Each result has a name or title field

tests.name: detail-with-embeds
tests.workflow_step: Get full detail with embeds — measure token cost of rich responses
assertions: Response is useful for downstream processing
